title: centaurea rigida
intro: Centaurea rigida, also known as the Rigid Centaury or Italian Centaury, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with indigestion and stomach pain. The health benefits of Centaurea rigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Centaurea rigida are commonly used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate digestive issues.
